content:
A complete breakdown of the new 12-month program and how early-career developers can apply before the July 17th deadline.

3 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Photo by Microsoft Copilot on UnsplashNon-Members: Free to read here.
I usually write about developer workflows, testing tools, setting up Cursor, or pushing micro-SaaS apps to production.
But today, I am pausing the usual programming to highlight a massive opportunity for early-career developers.
Anthropic just launched the Claude Corps fellowship.
It is a 12-month, in-person program that literally pays you to learn AI and build tools for mission-driven nonprofits.
Here is the kicker:
they pay $85,000 a year, plus full benefits like medical, dental, 401k, and disability insurance.
Who is this for?
If you are worried that you need a PhD or a decade of machine learning experience, you can relax.
Anthropic is specifically looking for people with under two years of full-time work experience.
